prompt: Using REFERENCE_0 as the character and outfit base, generate a polished photorealistic upscale scene of the same receptionist seated at a front desk in a modern office or clinic reception area. Preserve the navy suit, white shirt, brown shoulder-length hair, gold name badge, and the anonymized/blurred face treatment. Change the pose from the character sheet into a seated working posture: upper body centered, one hand resting on paperwork on the desk and the other arm reaching slightly toward the side as if assisting a visitor. Add a warm, softly blurred reception background with light wood counters and neutral walls. Include exactly 6 visible desk/background additions: 1 clipboard with papers in front of her, 1 black pen on the papers, 1 open laptop at the right edge, 1 small black desk sign at the left foreground, 1 table lamp in the rear left, and 1 small plant or greenery near the lamp. Make it look like a natural professional photo, vertical 3:4 composition, shallow depth of field, soft indoor lighting, crisp fabric detail, realistic skin and hair rendering, no character sheet panels, no extra people, no watermark.
